title: Anyone else notice this in EoE
display_title: Anyone else notice this in EoE
wikitext:
[]: Anyone else notice this in EoE?             Quote Post by CyberXIII » Tue Jul 19, 2011 7:18 pm Right before the MP EVAs start their battle with Asuka I noticed something odd. When one of them lands at the beginning, if you look closely you'll see some black things moving underneath his feet right before he hits the ground. Is it just me or did it just smash two of the JSSDF soldiers?

[]:             Quote Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Jul 19, 2011 7:42 pm Yes.

[]:             Quote Post by Shogo-Kun » Sun Jul 24, 2011 10:21 am I noticed that when I saw it on YouTube!

[]:             Quote Post by SHINOBI-03 » Sun Jul 24, 2011 11:28 am Unlucky bastards.

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Jul 24, 2011 1:27 pm Just another extra little bit of nastiness as a reward for the attentive viewer.

[]: Re: Anyone else notice this in EoE?             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Jul 24, 2011 1:58 pm CyberXIII wrote: Anyone else notice this in EoE?

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jul 24, 2011 6:33 pm There were similarly unlucky freakin' charred corpses in one of the "destruction shots" seen after Mari lifts Shinji out of the shelter in 2.X...

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Sun Jul 24, 2011 6:37 pm Hey, it's either get killed right away or experience the third impact.... Choosing the former then.
